description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the adoptopenjdk:11-jdk-hotspot Docker image and defines the variables GRADLE_OPTS="-Dorg.gradle.daemon=false", GRADLE_USER_HOME="$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.gradle" and KONAN_DATA_DIR="$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.konan". Configure a global cache with key "one-key-to-rule-them-all" covering $GRADLE_USER_HOME/wrapper/dists/, $GRADLE_USER_HOME/caches/modules-2/, $GRADLE_USER_HOME/caches/build-cache-1/ and $KONAN_DATA_DIR/kotlin-native-*, and add a before_script that removes the Gradle lock files. Define two stages, build and deploy; in the build stage add a **build** job that runs `./gradlew build`, stores the directories buildSrc/build/classes, build/bin, build/classes, build/libs and build/test-results as artifacts, and has no special trigger. In the deploy stage add three manual jobs that all depend on the build job and run only on the master branch when the $BINTRAY_KEY variable is present: **deploy-release** runs `./gradlew publishAllPublicationsToPublicRepository`; **deploy-snapshot** runs `./gradlew publishAllPublicationsToSnapshotRepository` with an extra variable SNAPSHOT_VERSION set to `$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA`; and **pages** runs `./gradlew dokkaHtml`, publishes the generated public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is also manual.
